title: Device  Home Screen - Starting app without internet connection
scenario: Verify that all data and images load correctly after enabling internet connection when the app was initially started offline.
steps: Launch the app while the device has no internet connection.
Observe the device list and note that some internet-dependent features (e.g., images on the home page) are missing.
Turn on the internet connection on the device.
Wait for the app to refresh or manually refresh the app.
Verify that all data and images load and display properly.
expected: After turning on the internet, all data and images load and display properly.
